name: Frozen LM Decoder
description: External frozen pretrained language model consuming prefix conditioning. Numpy codegen emits a stub; the real model is external (e.g. GPT-2 124M).
code:
# External frozen decoder: {{model_name}} ({{params}}), 0% trainable.
# Stub projection stands in for the frozen LM in numpy validation.
_fd{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn({{prefix}}.shape[-1], {{vocab_size}}).astype(np.float32)*0.02
{{logits}} = {{prefix}} @ _fd{{_id}}_W
